ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the protein */,
  "pref_name" TEXT /* Preferred name of the protein */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "structure" TEXT /* 3D structure of the protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Biological function of the protein */,
  "family" TEXT /* Protein family classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ligands" (
  "ligand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ligand */,
  "chembl_id" TEXT /* ChEMBL ID of the ligand */,
  "canonical_smiles" TEXT /* Canonical SMILES representation of the ligand */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the ligand */,
  "log_p" REAL /* LogP value of the ligand */,
  "smiles_standardized" TEXT /* Standardized SMILES representation of the ligand */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* InChIKey representation of the ligand */,
  "inchi" TEXT /* InChI representation of the ligand */,
  "fp2" TEXT /* Molecular fingerprint of the ligand */,
  "hac" INTEGER /* Number of heavy atoms in the ligand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ligand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., IC50, EC50) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assay_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay result */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein involved in the assay */,
  "ligand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ligand involved in the assay */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "activity_value" REAL /* Value of the activity (e.g., IC50 value) */,
  "activity_units" TEXT /* Units of the activity value (e.g., nM) */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "result_comment" TEXT /* Comments about the assay result */,
  "result_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the assay result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_results_ligand_id FOREIGN KEY ("ligand_id") REFERENCES ligands ("ligand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_results_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_results_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_comment" TEXT /* Comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES assay_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "ligand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ligand */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the ligand */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comments about the version changes */,
  "version_tag" TEXT /* Tag for the version (e.g., 'stable', 'beta') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_versions_ligand_id FOREIGN KEY ("ligand_id") REFERENCES ligands ("ligand_id")
)
